package rulecoverage

func PositiveTemplateParseInHotPath() string {
    ruleID := "template_parse_in_hot_path"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "html/template or text/template parse calls observed on request-style paths instead of startup-time caching."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
